channel.name: 🏅hall-of-fame
channel.topic: 🚀 The** 'Best Project of the Week' **event has officially started!

messages.content:
🚀 The** 'Best Project of the Week' **event has officially started!

🟡 Show off your best projects in #🔥-look-what-i-made-archive and vote your favourites by reacting with 👍 

🟡 The projects with most 👍 will win prestigious rewards and acknowledgement across the 7 seas 🫡 

Submissions are now open in #🔥-look-what-i-made-archive  

Get @chat role from <id:customize> to keep up with the event and best of luck to all the participants!

🏆 The **'Best Project of the Week'** event has finally ended! 🏆

We had a **TON** of extremely good projects and I hope y'all gained a lot of inspiration. **Everyone** who participated is a winner for building a project worth showing off! 🥳 

But the @WareWolves 🐺 have decided that this time the trophy goes to:

*epic drum rolls 🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁*

────────────────────────

🥇** #1 Place**
**Project:** https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1409498669367038092 
**Author:** @Fate Ol Et 
*(Seriously S-tier portfolio 🤯 )*

**🥈 #2 Place**
**Project:** https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1408809072714715268 
**Author:** @01xd8 


🥉** #3 Place**
**Project:** https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1408813944243753093
**Author:** @n8king 
 *(I hope you didn't have to sell your house to pay for Gemini API)*

────────────────────────

They will be getting the PRESTIGIOUS @👑 Event Champions role, a private VIP chat along with priority in certain future events. 

There are sooo many amazing projects here in #🔥-look-what-i-made-archive and I wish I could rank them myself. We have archived the channel so it's accessible to everyone in future.

@everyone who posted there, thanks a lot, y'all get +3000 aura points 🔥💙

🚀 The** 'Best Project of 2025' **event has officially started! 
@WareWolves 🐺 

🟡 Show off your best projects in #🔥-best-project-of-2025-archive and vote your favourites by reacting with 🔥 

🟡 The projects with most 🔥 will win prestigious rewards and acknowledgement across the 7 seas 🫡 

This time we have increased the event window from 7 -> 10 days so people get more time.

Submissions are now open in #🔥-best-project-of-2025-archive  

> Ps: ONLY 🔥 REACTIONS WILL COUNT AS A VALID VOTE. 
> Ps ps: The final rankings might change based on the **Mod Team's judgement** so the worthy gets better chances at winning.

Get @chat role from <id:customize> to keep up with the event and best of luck to all the participants!

Hello @chat Only 1.5 days remains before the event ends!

The winners will receive:

1. My friend request :woa: 
2. 15 min call with me ☎️
3. Temporary private chat room with me :mmhmhmhmmhm: :chop_chop: 
4. Special limited time role :tuxhmmm: 
5. Discord nitro :shockedultra: 🚀


I will keep increasing the prize pool in future if these events are a success. 

I will be attempting to review your submissions in an upcoming video... if Aa- I- i- don't awkward talk twuah :smilecry3:
A reminder that only 🔥 reaction votes will count as valid and our mod team might interfere to decide the final winners to ensure the best project actually wins, whilst considering public vote 🗳

🏆 The **'Best Project of the Week'** event has finally ended! 🏆

> It was really hard for me to decide for the winners because there were a LOT of underrated posts. Ultimately, I went along with democracy 🏅  

__I sincerely want to **congratulate everyone who participated** for being able to complete your projects!__ 🥳 
*Maybe the real treasure were the projects we made along the way...*

But the @WareWolves 🐺 have decided that this time the trophy goes to:

*epic drum rolls 🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁*

────────────────────────

There are sooo many amazing projects here in #🔥-best-project-of-2025-archive and I wish I could rank them myself. I will most likely be releasing a reaction video to these projects soon!

@everyone  who posted there, thanks a lot, y'all get +6700 aura points 🔥💙

@WareWolves 🐺 Here are some well deserving honourable mentions from the mod team who almost won by votes:

https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1450137651444318411
https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1452367305219506352
https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1450710147184726169
https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1449113014698639411
https://discord.com/channels/1369201318098370571/1449072803683897575 (Highest votes)

🚒 🚒🚒🧯🧯🧯🔥🔥🔥

Project **Manware Files** is here @WareWolves 🐺 ‼️

*We're organizing another project showcase event for the last time for now, due to several requests made by the community and for higher inclusivity!*

🔶 Show off your best projects in #🏝️redacted-island and vote your favourites by reacting with :eye_pop: 

🔶 Top 2️⃣ projects with most :eye_pop: reactions will win:

🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 

1. 3 month CodeCrafters subscription :eye_pop:(worth $120)
2. My friend request :mindblown: 
3. 15 min call with me :shockedultra: 🚀
4. Temporary private chat room with me :mmhmhmhmmhm: :chop_chop:
5. Special limited time role @👑 Event Champions  :tuxhmmm:

🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 🥁 

🔶 3️⃣ rd place will receive all of the above except CodeCrafters' subscription

🔶 @everyone who participates gets touched by Manware at night (optional)

🔶 __EVERY participant needs to post their **selfie **beside the **project **they made + **Manware's face** with every submission__. You can blur your face, photoshop, use AI, replace yourself with your cat and claim they made the project, and do anything creatively to meet this requirement.
Important disclosure: the image will be public and might get featured in my videos. Ping a mod if you have any concern.

🔶 ~90% of submissions will get **REDACTED **after the event

**__NEW CONDITIONS:__**

Since the prizes are being sponsored by CodeCrafters, we're introducing strict conditions.

🖤 Only :eye_pop: reaction will count as a valid vote.
🖤 The elites of this server might manipulate final results to ensure bad projects don't win.
🖤 Projects with more than 5 votes from previous events are NOT allowed.
🖤 Vibe coded projects are allowed but not eligible to win.
🖤 The winners will have to provide concrete evidence that their __project isn't vibe coded__. A project is considered vibe coded when more than 33% of it's code is produced by AI.

*__How to prove your project is NOT vibe coded?__ *

🃏 The most accurate evidence are git logs (commit history). 
🃏 Check if your editor stores timing logs, memory usage snapshots, relevant metadata - or if your operating systems stores these logs about your code editor usage. 
🃏 Another good evidence is a scanned notebook page, whiteboard photo or rough architecture sketch you built before the project.
🃏 If none of them are available, I will review your code. You need to be an experienced engineer to hide vibe coded clues.
🃏 I might take a short interview to assess your knowledge of the project in worst case scenario.

> We have once again increased the event window from 10 -> 14 days as per community's proposal.

Here's the link for Manware smileys: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1_ZOuSKCjlZlSrtVuYuxggtE7_eli7Q0H?usp=sharing

This is a fun hackathon. Ship something weird. Ship something honest. Ship something you enjoyed building.

Submissions are now open in 🔥 #🏝️redacted-island 🔥
sorry for the wall of text, the rules are stricter due to prizes being sponsored

@chat summary by grok


- Post your project in #🏝️redacted-island  
- **Must** include your selfie with:  
  → your project + **Manware's face** (can be creative: blur, AI, cat, capybara, photoshop etc.)  

- Everyone votes with **only :eye_pop: reactions**  
- **Top 2** most :eye_pop: → win:  
  1. 3-month CodeCrafters subscription ($120)  
  2. Friend request  
  3. 15 min call  
  4. Temp private chat room  
  5. Special role @👑 Event Champions  

- **3rd place** gets everything except the CodeCrafters subscription  
- All participants get "touched by Manware at night" (optional meme)  
- Event duration: **14 days**

**Strict anti-AI / new conditions:**  
- Projects with >5 votes from previous events → **not allowed**  
- Pure **vibe-coded** projects (mostly AI) → can participate but **cannot win**  
- Winners **must prove** project is **not** >33% AI-generated ("vibe-coded")  
  Proof methods (best → worst):  
  - git commit history  
  - editor/activity logs  
  - notebook/whiteboard photos  
  - code review by Manware  
  - possible short interview  

~90% of submissions will be **REDACTED** after the event.

**TL;DR:** Post cool/weird/honest project + creative selfie with Manware face → get :eye_pop: reactions → top 3 win cool prizes (but top 2 must prove they actually coded it themselves). Have fun! 🐺
feel free to ping me or mods for any doubt!

Hey @chat, __only *3 days* are left in the event!__ Due to lower submissions this time, you have a good chance to 🇼 🇮 🇳 :eye_pop: 

Opportunities like this are **rare.**

> Top 3 winners also receive:
> 1. My friend request
> 2. 15 min call with me
> 3. Temporary private chat room with me
> 4. Special limited time role @👑 Event Champions 

Cheers,
*Manware!*

Deciding the winning project for Manware Files was **really tough**. Once again we had so many insane projects.

__I sincerely want to **congratulate everyone who participated** for being able to complete your wonderful projects!__ 🥳 

But the @WareWolves 🐺 have decided that this time, based on :eye_pop:, the trophy goes to:

*epic drum rolls 🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁🥁*

I am sure they'll win in upcoming challenges 🎆  And let's be honest, these guys DON'T need CodeCrafters subscription. I will prepare more and more exciting rewards in the future!

> There are sooo many amazing projects (and creators :mmhmhmhmmhm:) here in #🏝️redacted-island and I wish I could rank them myself. I will most likely be releasing a reaction video to these projects soon!

@everyone  who posted there, thanks a lot, y'all get +6700 aura points 🔥💙

I was literally speechless at some of these projects. No idea how y'all keep getting crazier with this! My reaction video to this event's projects is finally out @chat 

I reviewed almost every project this time but gotta select only some for the final cut due to various reasons, like algorithm, my reaction, audience retention, and much more. Regardless, I probably included more than 50% of the projects!

https://youtu.be/X7wmVV9A5OQ

embeds.title: These Projects Keep Getting Crazier... | Discord Hackathon Review#2
embeds.description:
I can't believe he made this in high school. Is this what peak coding looks like?

👉 Build something insane: https://app.codecrafters.io/join?via=i-am-manware

🔵 wanna say hi? Join our DISCORD: https://discord.gg/QHskavXhaA

Hey, I am Manware🙂. My motive is to spread awareness and share what I learn solving my problems.

🌟Affiliates...

2. Multiple submissions are allowed
3. Vibe coded projects are allowed :great:
